name: Deep Dark Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hershey's cocoa or Hershey's European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans or one 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add eggs, milk, oil, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix on medium speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in boiling water (batter will be thin). Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes in round pans or 35-40 minutes in rectangular pan until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool cakes in pans on wire racks for 10 minutes, then remove and cool completely.
8. Frost with One-Bowl Buttercream Frosting.
9. Serve and enjoy!
One-Bowl Buttercream Frosting:
6 tablespoons butter or margarine, softened
2-2/3 cups powdered sugar
1/2 cup Hershey's Cocoa or Hershey's European Style Cocoa
1/3 cup Milk
1 teaspoon Vanilla extract
Instructions for frosting:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat butter until creamy.
2. Add powdered sugar and cocoa to the butter, alternating with milk, beating in gently until smooth.
3. Blend in vanilla.
4. Use as desired on the cooled cake.
